name: azure-platform-engineering
description: Azure implementation arm of the platform suite: agentic platform engineering on Azure with open-source tooling. Technical estate assessment (Resource Graph, azqr, Governance Visualizer, aztfexport) feeding the assessment-orchestrator state, platform/landing-zone topology design (Radius environment ladder, Azure Verified Modules), durable agentic operations on Dapr Workflow, four-layer IaC guardrail verification, and the golden-path-as-an-API contract behind APIM with a platform MCP server on the roadmap. Organizational maturity, org design, ROI, agent identity, and MCP authoring delegate to the companion platform-assessment and adp-enablement plugins.
